summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for JMC Law Firm website. All core features tested and working perfectly including responsive design, navigation, hero sections, interactive elements, and mobile functionality.

design_issues.issue: Font loading shows fallback fonts instead of specified Google Fonts
design_issues.description: Hero titles use serif fallback instead of Playfair Display, body text uses Lato correctly

passed_tests: Home page loads with Prizren hero image and full-height hero section
All navigation links work correctly (Home, About, Practice Areas, Contact)
About page loads with Kala hero image and interactive tabs function perfectly
Practice Areas page loads with Dukagjini hero image and expandable cards work
Contact page loads with gradient hero and split layout (contact info + Google Maps)
Footer displays on all pages with correct dark navy background (#0B1C2D)
Mobile hamburger menu opens/closes correctly and slides from right
All navigation links work in mobile menu
Navbar is not sticky - scrolls with page (position: static)
Responsive design works across desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports
All CTA buttons are clickable and functional
Footer interactive elements (email, phone links) work correctly
Google Maps integration working in both footer and contact page
Color scheme implementation matches requirements (dark grey navbar, cream body, dark navy footer)
Framer Motion animations functioning properly
All practice area cards expand/collapse correctly
About page tabs (Mission, Vision, Values, Why Choose Us) all functional
Hero sections use correct images as specified (Prizren, Kala, Dukagjini)
Contact page gradient background displays correctly
Mobile menu closes automatically after navigation
action_item_for_main_agent: Optional: Consider ensuring Google Fonts (Playfair Display) are loading correctly for headings. Current fallback serif fonts are acceptable but specified fonts would be preferred.
